articles.title: Polygon Whales Accumulate $56M Worth Of $POL In 96 Hours, Price Rally Ahead?
articles.description: Within the last 96 hours, a subset of large-scale investors popularly referred to as the whales, has swept in and brought up around to the tune of 140 Million Polygon (POL) tokens. This amounts to a total of $56 Million, according to analyst Ali_Charts. This huge purchase has caught the attention of many in the […] The post Polygon Whales Accumulate $56M Worth Of $POL In 96 Hours, Price Rally...

articles.title: Coinbase Wallet launches USDC rewards with 4.7% APY
articles.description: Coinbase Wallet users can now earn 4.7% APY on USDC holdings as the platform expands its rewards program globally.As announced in their press release, the new feature allows users to earn rewards on USDC without lock-up periods, with monthly payouts delivered directly to wallets on the Base network.The program is available in most regions worldwide and is rolling out to US users this week.USDC...

articles.title: Cardano’s On-Chain Activity Soars as ADA Rockets Above $0.8
articles.description: ADA appears to be decoupling from rest of the altcoins as on-chain activity and price metrics suggest a strong bullish resurgence.

articles.title: Saylor Urges Microsoft to Invest in Bitcoin
articles.description: Michael Saylor pitches Microsoft’s board on Bitcoin, arguing it could stabilize the stock and boost shareholder value ahead of a key vote.
